message:
fix(setup): sort merged aliases for deterministic output

The alias merge summary output varied between runs because HashMap
iteration order is non-deterministic. This caused confusing diffs
when comparing setup outputs.

Changes:
- Sort merged_aliases by canonical name before display
- Sort individual alias lists alphabetically
- Output is now stable across runs for same input

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
